source_estimate: 24% before D11 patch; expected 14% after patch, internal heuristic estimate

patches.action: Explain that FINE-style was implemented but excluded because it failed the pre-registered CICIDS symmetric smoke gate.
Clarify that CESNET postfilter25 is interpreted as cross-domain stability and evidence-retention evidence under a Macro-F1 ceiling.
Explain why disagreement-only filtering can underperform under correlated SOC noise.
State that ERR is a retained-mask evidence-retention measure, not detection accuracy.
Use implemented smoke-passed baseline language and remove broad overclaiming terms.
